description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:slim Docker image and a variable RUST_VERSION set to stable. Define a single stage called check-build-test and a job named check-build-test that runs in this stage. In the global before_script install system packages with apt update and apt install -y --no-install-recommends pkg-config libssl-dev, then install the Rust toolchain with rustup install $RUST_VERSION and rustup default $RUST_VERSION, and finally output rustc --version and cargo --version. The job script executes cargo check --verbose, cargo build --release --verbose, and cargo test --verbose. Cache the Rust toolchain and build artifacts using a cache keyed by $RUST_VERSION with paths /usr/local/rustup/, /usr/local/cargo/, and target/. The pipeline runs on every commit.
